nodes.name: 特鲁斯马迪山
nodes.summary: 特鲁斯马迪山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑胁啄花鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 黑胁啄花鸟
nodes.summary: 黑胁啄花鸟（Black-sided flowerpecker，学名 Dicaeum monticolum），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于婆罗洲、巽他荒原森林、特鲁斯马迪山，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 巽他荒原森林
nodes.summary: 巽他荒原森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括红头林鹧鸪、Bornean black magpie、黑胁啄花鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the island of Borneo, where it is found in the mountains, primarily above in elevation

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits a range of forest habitats, including primary and secondary montane forest, kerangas forest, and scrub, and is also occasionally found in gardens

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-sided flowerpecker is endemic to the montane forests of Borneo. It is typically seen above and as high as in some locations, though it also descends as low as on two of the island's bigger mountains (Kinabalu and Mount Trus Madi). There are far more records from Malaysia's states of Sabah and Sarawak than from Indonesia's Kalimantan provinces. It is found in primary and secondary forest, kerangas forest (heathland), scrub, and gardens

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits a range of forest habitats, including primary and secondary montane forest, kerangas forest, and scrub, and is also occasionally found in gardens
